Rule: treat each non-black 4-connected component as a rigid piece and slide all movable pieces right one step at a time simultaneously until nothing can move. The summary hint was used; it matched all official examples.

The generator matches the family by building five sparse small motifs on a black background, arranged as two row-sharing pairs plus one singleton across three vertical lanes, then deriving the output by right-packing those same pieces. No new shared primitive was needed.
